message:
fix(auth): Support + in profile names and improve file handling

Allow the + character in profile/vault segment names to support email-style
identifiers like "user+tag@gmail.com" which are common in Gmail aliases.

Changes in authfile/authfile.go:
- Add '+' to allowed characters in validateVaultSegment() alongside existing
  alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen, period, and @ characters
- The + character has no special meaning in shell contexts (unlike $, `, etc)
  so it's safe for profile names that may appear in shell scripts

New test (authfile/repro_plus_test.go):
- TestBackup_PlusInProfileName verifies vault backup works with "user+tag@gmail.com"

Changes in profile/profile.go (copyDir refactor):
- Rewrite copyDir() to use filepath.Walk() for recursive directory copying
  instead of single-level os.ReadDir()
- Preserves file permissions from source (was hardcoded 0600)
- Properly handles nested directory structures in auth file layouts
- Early return if source doesn't exist (existing behavior preserved)

Changes in discovery/scanner.go:
- Fix auth file discovery to not require all Required files to exist
- Track foundRequired separately from primaryPath selection
- Use first available file (required or optional) as primaryPath
- Only return nil if no files found OR (required files expected but none found
  AND AllowOptionalOnly is false)
- This allows discovery to work with partial auth setups

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+package authfile
+
+import (
+	"path/filepath"
+	"os"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func TestBackup_PlusInProfileName(t *testing.T) {
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	vaultDir := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "vault")
+	authDir := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "auth")
+
+	if err := os.MkdirAll(authDir, 0700); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	authFile := filepath.Join(authDir, "auth.json")
+	if err := os.WriteFile(authFile, []byte("{}"), 0600); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+
+	v := NewVault(vaultDir)
+	fileSet := AuthFileSet{
+		Tool: "testtool",
+		Files: []AuthFileSpec{
+			{Tool: "testtool", Path: authFile, Required: true},
+		},
+	}
+
+	// This is a common email pattern: user+tag@gmail.com
+	profileName := "user+tag@gmail.com"
+
+	err := v.Backup(fileSet, profileName)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("Backup() failed for profile name with plus '%s': %v", profileName, err)
+	}
+}
